subcodes.first_line: O my God! Bestow upon me utter detachment unto Thee, and strengthen me through the light of exultation in Thy presence. Draw me, through the fragrant breaths of Thy sanctity, unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فیا الهی هب لی کمال الانقطاع الیک و ایدنی بنور ابتهاج لدیک اجذبنی بنفحات قدسک الیک
subcodes.subjects: @absolute freedom; independence of God, @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @impossibility of true worship of God, @prayer for detachment
